ARTICLE_TITLE: Son Heung-min Leads Tottenham to Champions League Semifinal with Hat-trick Against Barcelona
ARTICLE_BODY: Tottenham Hotspur captain Son Heung-min delivered a spectacular performance in last night's Champions League quarterfinal second leg, scoring a hat-trick to lead his team to a 4-2 victory over Barcelona at Wembley Stadium. The South Korean forward's brilliance helped Tottenham overturn a 2-1 deficit from the first leg, securing a 5-4 aggregate win. Son's first goal came from a thunderous strike in the 23rd minute, followed by a clever header just before halftime. His match-winning goal arrived in the 78th minute with a trademark curling shot into the top corner. The 33-year-old's performance has sparked celebrations across South Korea, with fans praising his leadership and clinical finishing. Tottenham will now face Manchester City in the semifinals, with Son expressing confidence about reaching his first Champions League final.
